title: Audit Health Response
description: Response shape for GET /api/v1/audit/health. Mirrors TraigentBackend audit_routes.get_audit_health, which wraps a deterministic health snapshot under `data` (status, rolling 24h counters, warnings, ISO-8601 timestamp). Error path returns `success=false` with `error` and `message` strings; this schema covers both paths so the dashboard never reads through an unrecognized shape.

error.description: Short error code returned on the failure path.

message.description: Human-readable error detail returned on the failure path.

status.description: Rollup health status. Backend currently emits `healthy` when no warnings fire and `warning` when critical events or scope violations are present.

recent_events.description: Count of audit events in the last 30 minutes.

critical_events_24h.description: Count of events flagged as `severity=critical` in the last 24 hours.

scope_violations_24h.description: Count of tenant or project scope violations in the last 24 hours.

scope_discrepancies_24h.description: Count of scope dual-run discrepancies in the last 24 hours.

warnings.description: Human-readable warning messages explaining any non-healthy status.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp captured when the snapshot was produced.
